site.title: connolly.cloud
site.welcome: Welcome to the Connolly family homepage.
site.about: This little corner of the internet is a directory of the Connolly family and the things we make, tinker with, and share. It's deliberately simple: fast to load, easy to edit, and built to last. Poke around and say hello.

family.name: Alex Connolly
family.description: Keeper of connolly.cloud and general tinkerer of things that plug in.
